meaning: adj.[生]同源的,同基因的,同系的
examples: EAE can be induced actived by syngeneic or heterogeneous antigen from white matter of CNS. It shares many feathers with MS.
Conclusions: Halfmatched mixed BMT after activation could lower the GVHD reaction, which was relative to the ratio of syngeneic to allogeneic spleen cells.
Objective to explore feasibility of prevention of organ specific autoimmune disease by transplanting mixed fetal syngeneic or allogeneic and xenogeneic thymus.
